meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build a SaaS starter kit to overcome the no portfolio trap. An intermediate guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your launch.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a growth ceiling for founders. To break through, stop building one-off projects. Instead, engineer a modular SaaS starter kit that serves as your foundational architecture. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative logic, you ship production-grade SaaS products in days, not months.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the SaaS market is that nobody cares about your potential—they care about your proof of work. When your portfolio is empty, you are invisible to investors and enterprise clients alike. The cycle of 'needing a project to get a project' is the silent killer of ambitious founders.

But the tide is turning. By shifting from a 'builder' to an 'architect,' you can synthesize a reusable SaaS starter kit that serves as your master blueprint. This isn't just code; it is a high-velocity engine that turns raw ideas into monetizable assets, effectively turning your technical debt into a competitive advantage.

steps.title: Architecting the Core Auth-Database Flow
steps.description: Establish a bulletproof authentication and database schema that handles multi-tenancy from day one. This prevents costly refactoring later.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Next.js 15 boilerplate with Supabase Auth and RLS-enabled PostgreSQL schemas for a multi-tenant SaaS application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project structure with auth and database schemas'

steps.title: Implementing Tiered Subscription Logic
steps.description: Integrate Stripe billing early to ensure your architecture supports revenue generation, the heartbeat of any viable SaaS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler and subscription management UI that supports three tiers: Free, Pro, and Enterprise.

steps.title: Building the Modular Dashboard UI
steps.description: Develop a component-driven dashboard that can be themed for different SaaS verticals, drastically reducing your time-to-market.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive Shadcn-UI dashboard layout with sidebar navigation, breadcrumbs, and a modular widget grid system.

steps.title: Standardizing API Integration Layer
steps.description: Create a clean abstraction layer for external APIs (OpenAI, Resend, etc.) so your starter kit remains decoupled and maintainable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build an API abstraction layer using standard fetch patterns with built-in error handling and rate-limiting middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude refactor 'api-abstraction-layer' for standardized error handling

steps.title: Deploying the MVP Foundation
steps.description: Configure automated CI/CD pipelines to ensure that every push is a production-ready deploy, maintaining your velocity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel.

pro_tips: Always store your 'business logic' in a separate package/directory from your 'UI components' to allow for easier white-labeling.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your auth middleware first; if your security fails, your entire SaaS is worthless.
Implement a 'feature flag' system at the architecture level so you can toggle experimental modules without breaking production.
Prioritize 'Time-to-First-Dollar' over 'Time-to-First-Feature'—always integrate payments before you finish the UI.
Keep your database schema additive; never use destructive migrations in your production starter kit to ensure zero-downtime updates.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is deployed, use it to build three distinct micro-SaaS apps in under 30 days. This creates a diverse portfolio that demonstrates your ability to solve real problems across different industries.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start building for scale. This is the competitive edge elite founders use to dominate the market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
